name: disabled-source
description: spec-v52 §4.5.6 stale-source disabling. Same Medicare FFS CPAP packet as cms-dme, but the cms-ncd-lcd ledger source is marked disabled (its 404 was surfaced by scripts/refresh-pa-rules.mjs). Every rule anchored to cms-ncd-lcd is skipped with a status:'disabled' finding and recorded in the audit trail's disabledRules; the cms-iom-100-08 FFS rules (SWO / proof-of-delivery / PTAN) and all core / overlay rules still run. The shipped ledger disables nothing; this disablement lives only in the fixture.

cms-ncd-lcd.reason: CMS Medicare Coverage Database URL returned 404 on 2026-06-01; re-point pending
